scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n identity,catalog,checkout,frontend -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix services/identity run dev" "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
scripts.dev:v2: concurrently -n identity,catalog,checkout,frontend -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix services/identity run dev" "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
scripts.dev:checkout: concurrently -n catalog,checkout,frontend -c blue,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev"
